title: phlomitis pungens
intro: Phlomitis pungens, also known as Jerusalem sage, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Phlomitis pungens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
